violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: ternary-branch-collapse
; LINE: 310
; VIOLATION: ternary-branch-collapse at runDiff
(declare-const counter_310 Int)
(declare-const branch_taken Int)
(declare-const output_meaningful Int)
(assert (>= counter_310 0))
; branch_taken = 1 when counter == 1 (consequent), 0 otherwise (alternate)
(assert (= branch_taken (ite (= counter_310 1) 1 0)))
; both branches emit empty string — output is never meaningful
(assert (= output_meaningful 0))
; can we reach the plural branch with a non-trivial counter and still get no useful output?
(assert (> counter_310 1))
(check-sat)
